title: lundia virginalis var. nitidula
intro: Lundia virginalis var. nitidula, also known as Lundia, is a flowering plant species belonging to the family Verbenaceae. Lundia is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which have been traditionally used to treat various health issues. The plant's health benefits include reducing fever, relieving respiratory problems, and soothing digestive issues. Lundia is typically prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
